scripts.dev:electron: bun run build:shared && bun run build:extensions && bun --cwd packages/electron dev
scripts.dev:pwa: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/pwa dev
scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/contracts build && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime build && bun --cwd packages/shared build && bun --cwd packages/server build && bun --cwd packages/ui build && bun --cwd packages/pwa build && bun --cwd packages/push-relay build && bun --cwd packages/electron build && bun run build:extensions && bun run stage:bundled-extensions && bun run stage:bundled-skills
scripts.build:extensions: bun --cwd packages/extensions/template-mcp build && bun --cwd packages/extensions/canvas-mcp build && bun --cwd packages/extensions/apple-calendar-mcp build
scripts.build:shared: bun --cwd packages/contracts build && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime build && bun --cwd packages/shared build
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime typecheck && bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun --cwd packages/pwa typecheck && bun --cwd packages/push-relay typecheck && bun --cwd packages/electron typecheck && bun --cwd packages/extensions/template-mcp typecheck && bun --cwd packages/extensions/canvas-mcp typecheck && bun --cwd packages/extensions/apple-calendar-mcp typecheck
scripts.test: bun run build:shared && bun run test:contracts && bun run test:shared-runtime && bun run test:shared && bun run test:server && bun run test:ui && bun run test:pwa && bun run test:push-relay && bun run test:template-mcp && bun run test:canvas-mcp && bun run test:apple-calendar-mcp && bun run test:check:macos-signing-readiness && bun run test:stage:bundled-extensions && bun run test:stage:bundled-skills && bun run test:build-apple-calendar-bridge && bun run test:build-macos-desktop-artifact && bun run test:verify:electron:mac
